name: Octopai
description: Octopai — Automated data lineage and catalog platform tracing data from source to BI report across pipelines.

seo.title: Octopai — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Octopai: Octopai — Automated data lineage and catalog platform tracing data from source to BI report across pipelines.

when_to_use: Automated data lineage tracing from source to BI reports
Data catalog with business glossary and pipeline impact analysis
Compliance auditing by tracing PII through data pipelines
Cross-tool lineage across dbt, Informatica, and Snowflake
Reducing time to root-cause data quality issues in pipelines

pros: Automated data lineage across BI and ETL tools
Broad connector catalog for legacy systems
cons: Setup across heterogeneous stacks takes time
Cloud feel less modern than Atlan or Collibra
review.verdict: Useful lineage and catalog for enterprises with legacy BI sprawl, modern data teams lean Atlan or dbt-native lineage.
review.best_for: Enterprises with legacy BI tools needing end-to-end lineage without manual effort
review.not_for: Modern data stacks already using dbt and Atlan for lineage and catalog

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
